first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the core reasoning for the low score remains unchanged across both evaluations: the candidate critically lacks the mandatory C++ and financial domain experience. The differences in wording for strengths and concerns are minor rephrasings and re-prioritizations of the same resume facts, well within the scope of normal run-to-run variation. There is no language in the variant evaluation that suggests the change in location from Berlin to Bangalore influenced the outcome.
